description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a minimalist rectangular layout and flat roofs. The structure features two main volumes: a larger living area and a smaller detached section, both connected by a spacious patio. A prominent swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor space, bordered by clean, geometric lines and a light-colored deck. Large glass windows and sliding doors run along the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a combination of concrete, glass, and metal elements. The overall design emphasizes open space, simplicity, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a spacious patio with a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass facade, and the pool area adjacent to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, full pool length, and the connection between the two building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio, and the smaller detached section of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the main living area, extensive glass frontage, and the pool's position relative to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide glass doors, minimal steps, and a covered overhang integrated into the facade
